what_it_does: An empty .gitkeep file that exists solely so Git tracks the otherwise empty company/canvas/ directory.
standouts: It is a content-less placeholder file
Its presence signals the canvas directory is intentionally kept under version control
conventions: Follows the common Git convention of using a .gitkeep file to preserve an empty directory in version control
notes: An empty .gitkeep placeholder that ensures the canvas directory is tracked by Git.
questions: What content or assets are intended to be placed in the canvas directory?
Is this directory meant for design canvases, UI layouts, or another purpose?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's purpose as a directory placeholder matches its actual content (empty).
intention_signals: Preserve the canvas directory in the repository even though it currently contains no files.
contribution: It records the intended existence of the canvas directory in the project structure, ensuring Git tracks it and future assets have a defined location.
summary_for_embedding: An empty .gitkeep file in company/canvas/ that exists only to keep the directory under version control.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to preserve the canvas directory as a tracked location for future content.
